name: IMAP + SMTP MCP bridge
description: Protocol-level IMAP + SMTP MCP server bound to an app-specific password. Five tools mapping to the canonical Gmail-style surface (search_threads, get_thread, create_draft, send_draft, modify_thread_labels), implemented over IMAPrev1 + Gmail extensions (X-GM-RAW / X-GM-THRID / X-GM-LABELS) and SMTPS. Provider-agnostic at the protocol level; the bridge accepts any IETF-compliant IMAP/SMTP host.
